titleStmt.title: SII 6.136: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 136. (A.R. No. 175 of 1897). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīmattri ṁvatsaraṁbulu 4 śrāhi śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1071 nēṁṭṭi paviṣya kriṣṇa daśamiyu nādivāramu nuttarā
yaṇasaṁkrāṁtti nimittamuna Uttamacōḍavaḷanāṁṭi kammanāṁṭṭi . prēṁppalli śrībhāvanārāyaṇadēvaraku svasti samastapastuvistāratatvālōka satyaśaucācāra nayavinayadānamāhōtsāhōnnatavī
guṇālaṁkrita dēvabrāhmaṇapādārādhita Āśritajanasaṁtta¨rppaṇa triptībhūtānēkadvijagaṇāśī¨rvvādaka¨rnnapramudita prabuddhahridayapariṇatāṁtaḥkaraṇa gaurīkōmalacaraṇanakhamaṇimayūkhamālā¨rppitarā
jamānamāni dha¨rmmapaṭṭanādhiṣṭāyaka himavatsētupariyaṁttaśrēṣṭa śrēṣṭaseṭṭigaṇādhīśa pratipattiśrīśailābhidhānōttamavaiśyāgrahāraṁbuna grāmakhēḍa kha¨rvvaṇa maḍaṁbapaṭṭiṇa drōṇāmukha
sannivāsaṁbaina kammavaiṣyalalōṁ ganunpaṟti kulōttaṁggacōḍa namuna nakarapuruṣuṁḍaina nagarīśvara tammiseṭṭiyaina brammiseṭṭikiṁ jakkamanāyakuṟāliki suputruṁḍaina kulōttu
ṁggacōḍagāṁgēyarāyasamayasēnādhipatiyaina kanniseṭṭi Ācaṁdrā¨rkka makhaṁḍava¨rttidīpamunakuṁ beṭṭina birudamāḍalu padumūṁḍunū vīniṁ jēkoni
la paṁḍitula pe¨rmmaḍiyu vīri gōviṁddiyu Apparāju koḍuku nalla bavvanayu kētamarāju koḍku koṁmanayu vīri sūranayu vīri mrāleyu nallanāraparā manmaṁḍu
dāmōdaruṁḍunu rāghavekāmanayu guṁḍenāreṁḍunu Itani tōḍi pālikāṁpu pōtavaḍgunakuṁgā gōkana paṁḍitula prōleyuṁgā nī tommaṁḍru paricārakulu
dama putrānupavitrikamu nitya māneṁḍu neyi vōyaṁgalavāru .
Digital edition of SII 6.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
